# The Forest - AI-Readable Content Index

The Forest is a luxury golf estate by ABL Group in Teski Village, Sikhri Tehsil, Deeg District, Rajasthan — approximately 2 hours from Delhi via the Delhi-Mumbai Expressway corridor.

## What The Forest offers
- Executive 9-hole golf course + night golf (floodlit fairways)
- Luxury spa, wellness, sauna, and infinity pool
- Clubhouse with social and dining spaces
- Water-led landscape with trails
- 330 freehold legacy plots: 500–4000 sq.yd, ₹50L – ₹10Cr+
- Founding Member Program: first 50 buyers receive 10–20% pre-launch discounts

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://the-forest.online/) - Luxury golf estate landing page
- [Farmhouse Near Delhi](https://the-forest.online/farmhouse-near-delhi) - Farmhouse estate guide and pricing
- [Managed Farmland](https://the-forest.online/managed-farmland) - Managed estate ownership model
- [Golf Estate](https://the-forest.online/golf-estate) - Golf estate overview and plot information
- [Blog / Insights](https://the-forest.online/blog) - Guides on farmhouse, golf estate, managed farmland, investment
- [Pricing](https://the-forest.online/#pricing) - Plot categories and price ranges
- [FAQ](https://the-forest.online/#faq) - Frequently asked questions
- [Contact](https://the-forest.online/#contact) - Enquiry and site visit booking

## Pricing
| Category | Size | Price |
|---|---|---|
| Estate Plots | 500–1000 sq.yd | ₹50L – ₹1 Cr |
| Premium Estate | 1000–2000 sq.yd | ₹1 Cr – ₹2.4 Cr |
| Large Estate | 2000–4000 sq.yd | ₹2.4 Cr – ₹6 Cr |
| Farmhouse Plots | Private estate land | ₹3 Cr – ₹10 Cr+ |

## Developer
ABL Group (Ascent Buildhome Developers Ltd.) — led by Mr. Murshid Ahmed (32+ years real estate experience, NCR, Rajasthan, Odisha). Landmark: Apna Ghar, Faridabad.

## Value position
50–60% price advantage vs. comparable Gurgaon golf estates. Rajasthan RERA regulated. Delhi-Mumbai Expressway corridor.

## Contact
- Website: https://the-forest.online
- Enquiry form: https://the-forest.online/#contact
